title: Pogo Panic
description:
Now with MultiplayerClimb the madness together. Team up for co-op chaos, recover from disasters, and turn every miraculous save into a shared victory scream. It is the same brutal climb, just louder with friends.

Pogo Physics• Pure Momentum - Every jab of the spring obeys real-world inertia (kinda). Miss the angle and you will ricochet straight back to pavement.[]No Checkpoints - One slip, restart. Skill or sheer stubbornness is all that keeps you going.

• Tilt, Snap, Shatter - Platforms sway, crumble, or launch you skyward like a catapult. Every surface becomes a fresh launchpad for your next leap.

Jet Jitters• Micro Thruster - A jury-rigged jetpack gives a heartbeat of thrust, just enough to rescue you or send you spiraling.

• Fuel on Fumes - The tank empties in seconds. Refills are scarce and never convenient.

• Last-Chance Heroics - Fire the thruster at the perfect millisecond to salvage free-fall panic or stretch your flight by a few humbling meters.

Obstacles With IssuesHuge moving walls that track your hops, swinging wrecking hammers, cannons that treat you like target practice. Everything here craves a cardboard casserole. Outsmart them or taste defeat.

Ready?Pogo a cardboard man through madness, blast that jetpack on fumes, and punch gravity where it hurts. Suit up - cereal boxes and all. Go solo or bring friends for multiplayer climbing chaos. See you at the summit... if the duct tape holds.
description_short: Pogo Panic is a punishing parkour climb where you can play solo or co-op. Bounce on a pogo stick, burst a fleeting jetpack, and fight gravity through vertical sky courses with optional checkpoints. Turn them off for a full no mercy run.
